Your observation, however small, helps improve the methodology for everyone.
If confirmed, it may be folded into FM taxonomy revisions, verification notes, scope clarifications, or template improvements.

## AI Model
[e.g., Claude Code, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot]

## What You Tested
[e.g., Control OS template, FM-40 cheatsheet, Before/After demo]

## What You Observed
[Describe the behavior you observed]

## Expected vs Actual
Expected: [e.g., FM-09 (omission) suppressed by Control OS]
Actual: [e.g., AI still omitted 2 items despite the rule]

## FM Number (if known)
[e.g., FM-09, FM-03. Leave blank if unsure — the author will classify]

## Environment Context (optional)
[Any relevant details about your setup]

## May we quote this observation publicly?
[Yes / No / With anonymization]
